testcase.name: homepage contact form › renders core homepage content and the contact form
homepage contact form › blocks submission until service and timeline are selected
homepage contact form › submits successfully, sends the expected payload, and resets the form
homepage contact form › surfaces API errors without clearing the form
homepage UI regressions › renders the major homepage sections and supports anchor navigation
homepage UI regressions › navigates from homepage cards and buttons to service and blog pages
homepage UI regressions › toggles FAQ answers and testimonial slides
homepage UI regressions › supports the mobile menu and section navigation on small screens
homepage UI regressions › opens and sends the WhatsApp widget message through the expected URL
